      map := fun {n m} f ω => { toFun := fun x => (ω (f.unop x)).compLinearMap ↑(fderiv ℝ (⇑f.unop) x), dsmooth := ⋯ },
      map_id := ⋯, map_comp := ⋯ }

      simp only [Pi.comp_apply, Function.comp_apply] at h ⊢
      exact h
    · intro l g hg
      ext x
      simp only [Pi.comp_apply, Function.comp_apply]

      simp only [Pi.comp_apply, Function.comp_apply] at h
      exact h
    · intro φ hφ

apply Presheaf.IsSheaf.ofEqualizer
    intro n s hs
    refine Sheaf.equalizer_condition.mpr fun t ht ↦ ?_
    ext ω
    dsimp at *
    refine DSmoothMap.ext fun x ↦ ?_
    have h := hs.1 (.op 0) (⟨fun _ ↦ x, dsmooth_const⟩ : Eucl 0 ⟶ n)
    have hx := hs.2 x
    rw [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hx
    rw [Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hi
    obtain ⟨g, hg, rfl⟩ := hi
    specialize ht g hg
    specialize t g hg
    simp_all

    · exact dsmooth_of_contDiff ⊤

    · intro σ hσ; ext x; rfl

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intros n s hs f hf
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ Classical.choose (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x), by
      intro x
      obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.1 (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x)
      obtain ⟨g, hg, hx⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 hi
      have := hf g hg
      exact (Classical.choose_spec (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ (g x))).symm ▸ this ▸ rfl⟩,
      fun l g hg ↦ by
        ext x
        have := hf g hg
        exact (Classical.choose_spec (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ (g x))).symm ▸ this ▸ rfl,
      fun φ hφ ↦ by
        ext x
        have := hf (Classical.choose (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x))
          (Classical.choose_spec (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x))
        exact (Classical.choose_spec (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x)).symm ▸ this ▸ rfl⟩
